message:
feat(pager): per-transaction bumpalo scratch arena (IMPL-3 / AG-4B)

Introduce a bumpalo scratch arena as a first-class field on
`SimpleTransaction` so transient per-transaction allocations (SmallVec
spills during batching, temporary frame-plan structures, HashSet
conflict pages, etc.) can be amortised across a single transaction's
lifetime instead of paying an allocator round trip on every construct.

crates/fsqlite-pager/Cargo.toml, Cargo.lock
- Add `bumpalo = "3"` as a new direct dependency; lockfile picks up
  the expected transitive entry in the frankensqlite-pager package
  row.

crates/fsqlite-pager/src/pager.rs
- New `scratch_arena: bumpalo::Bump` field on `SimpleTransaction`.
  Both `begin_internal` and `begin_fast_path` construct a fresh
  `Bump::new()` so each transaction starts with an empty arena.
- Add `pub(crate) fn scratch_arena(&self) -> &bumpalo::Bump`
  accessor. `Bump::alloc` takes `&self`, so returning `&Bump` is
  enough — interior mutability is not required.
- Doc comment pins the lifecycle contract: arena is created on
  begin, dropped on transaction drop, reset on commit AND rollback,
  and never carries allocations across transaction boundaries.
  Callers must not hold arena-allocated references across a
  transaction-boundary method call on `SimpleTransaction`.

No call sites migrated in this commit — this is just the landing
pad. The arena reset / drop hooks will be wired into commit,
rollback, and Drop in the follow-up.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
